init_hook: # Install Go protobuf plugins if not present
if ! command -v protoc-gen-go &> /dev/null; then go install google.golang.org/protobuf/cmd/protoc-gen-go@latest; fi
if ! command -v protoc-gen-go-grpc &> /dev/null; then go install google.golang.org/grpc/cmd/protoc-gen-go-grpc@latest; fi

build-node-agent: echo '🔨 Building node-agent for Linux/amd64 using Podman...'
docker.io/golang:1.22 bash -c 'apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libvirt-dev pkg-config gcc && make node-agent-podman'
build-iso: echo '🔨 Building kcore ISO (this will take 10-30 minutes)...'
start-controller: echo 'Make sure you have controller.yaml configured!'
create-vm: if [ -z "$NODE_IP" ]; then echo '❌ Error: NODE_IP not set'; exit 1; fi
list-node-services: echo '📋 Listing gRPC services on node...'
if [ -z "$NODE_IP" ]; then echo '❌ Error: NODE_IP not set'; exit 1; fi
delete-vm: echo 'Usage: Requires NODE_IP and VM_ID environment variables'
echo 'Example: NODE_IP=192.168.40.146 VM_ID=<uuid> devbox run delete-vm'
if [ -z "$NODE_IP" ]; then echo '❌ Error: NODE_IP not set'; exit 1; fi
if [ -z "$VM_ID" ]; then echo '❌ Error: VM_ID not set'; exit 1; fi
test-node: if [ -z "$NODE_IP" ]; then echo '❌ Error: NODE_IP not set'; exit 1; fi
nc -zv $NODE_IP 9091 || echo '❌ Cannot connect to node'
$NODE_IP:9091 list || echo '❌ gRPC service not responding'
deploy-node: echo '📦 Deploying node-agent and certs to node...'
if [ -z "$NODE_IP" ]; then echo '❌ Error: NODE_IP not set'; exit 1; fi
echo '❌ node-agent binary not found. Run: devbox run build-node-agent'
echo '✅ Deployment complete! Restart node-agent: systemctl restart kcode-node-agent'
write-usb: echo '💾 Writing ISO to USB drive...'
if [ -z "$USB_DEVICE" ]; then echo '❌ Error: USB_DEVICE not set'; exit 1; fi
if [ ! -f result/iso/*.iso ]; then echo '❌ ISO not found. Run: devbox run build-iso'; exit 1; fi
echo '⚠️  This will ERASE all data on the USB drive!'
sudo dd if=$ISO_FILE of=$USB_DEVICE bs=4m status=progress
sudo dd if=$ISO_FILE of=$USB_DEVICE bs=4M status=progress oflag=sync
help: echo '  build-node-agent   - Build node-agent for Linux'
echo '  build-iso          - Build bootable NixOS ISO'
echo '  list-node-services - List available gRPC services'
echo '  deploy-node        - Deploy node-agent to node'
echo '  create-vm          - Create a test VM'
echo '  write-usb          - Write ISO to USB (requires USB_DEVICE=/dev/diskX)'
echo '  See QUICKSTART.md for installation guide'
echo '  See ARCHITECTURE.md for system design'
